raw_resume_text:
GERSON JONATHAN SANTOS
(734) 767-4827 | johnsantos.1018@gmail.com | Bilingual: English & Spanish

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Senior Operations Manager with 14+ years of experience leading large teams, managing multi-shift operations, and driving performance in high-volume enterprise environments. Currently responsible for site-wide operations supporting Amazon fulfillment facilities with oversight of 125+ employees including supervisors and team leaders. Experienced in workforce planning, operational execution, safety compliance, and leadership development within large-scale logistics environments.

CORE LEADERSHIP COMPETENCIES
Large-Scale Workforce Leadership (125+ Employees)
Multi-Site Operations Management
Facility Operations & Logistics Support
Labor Planning & Productivity Optimization
Multi-Shift Workforce Coordination
Safety Compliance & OSHA Standards
Performance Management & Leadership Development
Client & Stakeholder Collaboration
Contract Compliance & Service Delivery

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
ServiceMaster by Elite — Site Operations Manager | Ohio | December 2024 – Present
Leadership Scope: 125+ employees | multi-shift operations | Amazon Fulfillment Facility
Lead site-wide janitorial and facility support operations for Amazon fulfillment centers. Direct daily operational planning across multiple floors and zones supporting warehouse production. Manage staffing strategy, labor allocation, scheduling, and workforce productivity across multi-shift teams. Supervise supervisors, shift leaders, and frontline employees while driving accountability and leadership development. Partner with Amazon operations leadership and safety teams. Ensure OSHA compliance and operational procedures. Implement sanitation workflows improving efficiency. Lead onboarding, training, and leadership development. Monitor operational metrics, labor utilization, and service quality.

ServiceMaster by Crane — Shift Manager | Michigan | March 2024 – December 2024
Managed shift operations overseeing custodial teams supporting enterprise facilities. Supervised team leaders and frontline employees ensuring productivity, safety compliance, and service quality. Directed daily shift planning, staffing coordination, and operational task execution. Collaborated with facility leadership to improve workflow efficiency. Provided employee coaching, training, and performance management.

Kellermeyer Bergensons Services (KBS) — Zone Manager | Michigan | December 2023 – March 2024
Operational Scope: 19 Amazon Sites | Fulfillment Centers (FC) and Amazon Logistics (AMZL)
Managed custodial and facility support operations across 19 Amazon sites. Supported FC and AMZL facilities ensuring cleanliness and safety standards. Oversaw multi-site staffing coordination and workforce performance. Conducted site visits, operational walkthroughs, and quality audits. Partnered with Amazon site leadership. Supervised frontline teams; coaching, training, performance management. Ensured OSHA compliance and operational procedures. Responded to escalations and staffing challenges. Monitored supply usage and operational resources.

EARLIER ENTERPRISE EXPERIENCE
Arbor Research Collaborative for Health — Senior IT Support Specialist | Michigan | 2023–2024
OSRAM Opto-Semiconductors — IS Support Specialist | Michigan | 2017–2022
OneMagnify — Desktop Administrator | Detroit, MI | 2022
Manheim Detroit — Field Service Technician | Michigan | 2017
Domino's Corporate — IT Consultant | Michigan | 2016–2017
Little Caesars — Desktop Engineer | Michigan | 2016
ThyssenKrupp — IT Engineer | Michigan | 2015
Headwaters — IT Help Desk Analyst | Michigan | 2014–2015
Chrysler — SAP Help Desk Analyst | Michigan | 2013–2014
Logicalis — Service Desk Technician | Michigan | 2012–2013
Stefanini — Help Desk Technician | Michigan | 2010–2012
